content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:11 and its neighbor atoms. Let me analyze the connections:

Atom C:11 (carbon) is bonded to:
- N:10 (nitrogen) - visible as a blue atom connected to C:11
- C:12 (carbon) - visible as an orange atom connected to C:11
- H:29 (hydrogen) - visible as a white atom connected to C:11

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 4696, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_4696.xyz".

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 11 (C) are:
- Atom index 10, element N
- Atom index 12, element C  
- Atom index 29, element H

Geomconf_index: 4696

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
